content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 19, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 19 focused on cloud infrastructure, OS stability, and mobile/desktop build improvements. Key achievements include finalizing cloud deployment endpoints, enhancing local inference via FFI, and resolving critical boot deadlocks. The team also pushed significant polish to the elizaOS live runtime and addressed billing record errors in the cloud API.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & API Enhancements**
*   Completed cloud deployment endpoints by adding `POST /api/v1/apps/[id]/deploy` and `GET .../deploy/status` ([#7804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7804)).
*   Implemented non-fatal error handling for billing records to prevent 500 errors in non-streaming chat completions ([#7794](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7794)).
*   Updated npm release workflows to remove OIDC dependencies and ensure consistent auth via `NPM_TOKEN` ([#7811](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7811)).

**OS, Runtime, and Build Stability**
*   Resolved TLA/barrel-import deadlocks in cloud Docker containers ([#7801](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7801)).
*   Fixed packaged-runtime blockers for `elizaOS` live, ensuring correct plugin staging ([#7800](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7800)).
*   Improved mobile and desktop build reliability by resolving Capacitor CLI paths and supporting nested workspace builds ([#7799](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7799), [#7798](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7798)).
*   Refined elizaOS branding and hardened smoke checks for USB installers ([#7797](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7797), [#7790](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7790)).

**Inference & Training Features**
*   Added a `--low-vram-smoke` CLI preset for 2B SFT training on 12GB consumer GPUs ([#7805](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7805)).
*   Wired slot save/restore and prewarm functionality through FFI for local inference ([#7796](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7796)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud Lifecycle & Jobs:** [#7816](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7816), [#7815](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7815), [#7810](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7810), [#7808](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7808) focus on migrating agent lifecycle operations to a job queue.
*   **UI & Fixes:** [#7814](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7814) (Tailwind z-index), [#7813](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7813) (async job tracking), [#7812](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7812) (desktop release inputs), [#7803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7803) (live demo polish), [#7793](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7793) (E2E testing), [#7792](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7792) (Android MTP/OmniVoice), and [#7791](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7791) (salvage work).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Cloud API Billing Errors**
*   Resolved [#7794](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7794): Fixed 500 errors during non-streaming chat completions by making billing record insertion non-fatal, improving database error logging, and redacting sensitive SQL/parameter data from API responses.

## NEW ISSUES
*   No new issues were reported.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None (No issues currently meet the criteria of having more than 3 comments).
